title: cyclosorus sclerophyllus
intro: Cyclosorus sclerophyllus, also known as the stiff-leaved cyclosorus or hard-leaved cyclosorus, is a type of plant belonging to the family Blechnaceae and is native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be used to treat wounds, infections, and other health issues. The health benefits of Cyclosorus sclerophyllus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even act as an antispasmodic to relieve muscle cramps and spasms. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
